subcodes.first_line: In this day praise and thanksgiving are reserved for the chosen ones - those souls who have attained, and continue to attain, unto the Sealed Wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حمد و شکر مخصوص اولیاست یعنی نفوسی که برحیق مختوم رسیده و میرسند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
